economic_mechanism: Scheduled FOMC decisions resolve a large prior-known macro information set; in an already non-bearish SPY regime, gradual interpretation and institutional repositioning might create positive five-session drift beyond ordinary same-regime drift.
candidate_or_family_scope: Exact FOMC_INFORMATION_RESOLUTION_SPY_BULL_CALL_21D_V1 / FOMC_POLICY_INFORMATION_RESOLUTION_DRIFT: official exact-title 14:00 ET Federal Reserve statement rows from 2013-01-01 through 2025-12-31; SPY prior close above fully warmed SMA100 and prior 60-session return above zero; next-session-open through fifth-session-close outcome; one-to-one prior-only same-regime controls; future conditional one-lot 18-24 DTE $2 bull-call debit spread only. capital_fit_usd=200; frictionless planning max_loss_usd=200 before closing friction; max_lots=1.
falsifier: Close the exact family if the chronological first 60% has fewer than 36 matched pairs, fewer than six event years, control support below 80%, non-positive event mean after 10 bps, non-positive paired mean, non-positive one-sided 90% year-block-bootstrap lower bound, paired positive frequency below 55%, event worst decile below -5%, or any source, chronology, lag, overlap, reuse, population, holdout, option-pricing, or strict-JSON integrity violation.

strategy_advancement.summary: The claim-invalidating control-source-coverage defect was repaired and the unchanged dependent experiment was rerun to FAMILY_CLOSED. The exact FOMC bullish five-session drift mechanism remains at F0 closed; no F1, L1, leader, capital seat, registry, paper, shadow, arm, broker, funding, or live authority was earned.

search_information.summary: The wake distinguished candidate-event scope from full source-covered control-exclusion scope, fail-closed controls before the first source-covered event, preserved the sealed holdout and zero option pricing, and decisively rejected a new official scheduled-macro bullish-drift mechanism after the repaired train-only retest.

useful_deltas.summary: Split candidate events from the full official control-exclusion population, forbade controls before the first source-covered exact event, persisted both scopes and source-coverage integrity, and added boundaries for events outside the candidate window and pre-coverage controls.

Reran the unchanged FOMC train-only experiment after repair: 46 pairs across eight years and 97.8723% support retained clean integrity, but event return after cost was -0.275586%, paired excess -0.453418%, paired-positive frequency 39.1304%, and year-block LB90 -0.781803%; four frozen edge gates failed and the exact family closed.

Completed the FOMC successor epoch with one counted no-advance decision, quarantined both stable family identifiers without opening the sealed 32-blueprint holdout or retuning sign/horizon/regime/control/option geometry, and retained exactly one context-only CPI successor seed with stricter official-source coverage rules.

critic_findings.finding: Correct living prose that understated the pre-fix contamination as one control; the audit found eight pre-coverage control entries, 12 rematches among shared decisions, and one dropped decision date.
critic_findings.rationale: Executor, finalizer, readiness, and index surfaces now state the eight-window contamination and rematch breadth. The underlying machinery now enforces full source-covered event exclusion and the tests pin both out-of-candidate-window event exclusion and pre-source-coverage failure.

critic_findings.finding: Tighten the one CPI NEXT with genuinely distinct inflation-release economics, official prior-known source coverage, no FOMC holdout or retune, predeclared signed outcome/control geometry, zero option pricing at F0, and orientation freedom to supersede.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected only as a code-repair finding because no machinery defect was alleged. The design obligation is accepted in merged-next-seed.md, finalizer/readiness/learning surfaces, and the machine next value; it remains one context-only seed and not an automatic strategy assignment.

critic_findings.finding: Refresh readiness strategy-convergence and epoch prose to the completed FOMC close, one no-advance, zero living candidates, and no leader without inventing phase green or a capital seat.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected only as a machinery finding. The stale surface obligation is accepted and repaired directly in reports/readiness/LATEST.md and the finalizer report; no phase, B-check, authority, or capital seat is promoted.

critic_findings.finding: Finalizer must independently rerun focused, full unittest, full pytest, compilation, deterministic replay, handoff, and completion-prepare checks.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected only as a code defect because this is verification ownership rather than broken machinery. The obligation is accepted; exact finalizer commands and results are recorded in learning-promotion.md and were not inherited from executor prose.

critic_findings.finding: Emit the expected schema-v2 compounding and learning-promotion handoff with BLOCKER_REMOVED_AND_RETESTED, dependent FAMILY_CLOSED, false advancement, both closed IDs, useful deltas, and exactly one CPI NEXT.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as an unexpected-defect interpretation because these files are intentionally finalizer-owned and absent during the partial phases. The obligation is satisfied by this schema-v2 handoff and learning-promotion.md, then independently validated.

critic_findings.finding: Prefer max/median control-calendar distance and extreme paired-difference diagnostics before any near-threshold scheduled-event promotion claim.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as a blocker for this multi-gate negative close: event center, paired center, frequency, and dependence-aware lower bound are all materially adverse, so the omitted diagnostics cannot rescue or overturn the decision. The next CPI scheduled-event seed explicitly requires these match-quality diagnostics before any promote claim.

data_dependencies: No new data are required to preserve this exact FOMC family close; reopening requires a genuinely new economic forecast or evidence mechanism rather than threshold, horizon, sign, control, DTE, width, or option-wrapper retuning.

The context-only CPI successor requires an official prior-known BLS release identity and timestamp source with explicit coverage start plus lag-safe SPY history; any later option stage requires a separate charter and claim-appropriate observed/calibrated option evidence before L1 or paper authority.

The parked TSLL observed term-carry diagonal still requires its frozen 12 weekday-RTH dates, three short-expiry cycles, 20 complete non-overlapping paths, eight frozen controls, and structural assignment/gap/exercise/liquidation max-loss evidence before evaluation.
next: CPI_RELEASE_INFORMATION_RESOLUTION_SPY_F0 (context-only, not an order): assess a genuinely distinct official 08:30 ET CPI/inflation-surprise policy-repricing mechanism. Before outcomes freeze the official prior-known source identity, publication timestamps and coverage start; separate candidate-event from full control-exclusion scope; forbid pre-coverage controls; map ambiguous times to stand-aside; predeclare signed multi-session SPY geometry with no post-hoc sign flip; use prior-only same-regime no-reuse controls; report max/median control distance and extreme-pair counts; retain chronological train plus sealed unread holdout; require dependence-aware uncertainty, tail, density, support, and integrity gates; and run zero option marks at F0. Do not open or reuse the FOMC holdout/outcomes/controls, retune the closed FOMC family, or relabel another closed mechanism. Any future one-lot defined-risk option expression needs a separate charter with capital_fit_usd, max_loss_usd, and max_lots=1. Orientation may supersede this seed for a higher-information non-quarantined route; no registry, paper force, shadow, arm, broker, funding, or live action.
